🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert PNG to JPG without losing quality

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your PNG files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

This page encodes JPG at high quality (92%) and keeps the original resolution, so the visual difference from your PNG is negligible while the file gets much smaller. For photos this is the sweet spot between size and quality.

How to convert

  1. Drop your PNG into the box.
  2. We keep full resolution and use a high quality setting.
  3. Download and compare — it should look identical at normal sizes.

FAQ

Can JPG match PNG exactly?

Not pixel-for-pixel — JPG is lossy. But at 92% quality the difference is invisible to the eye for most images.
